title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with Yaeno
Muteki...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes seem drawn to a claw machine filled with
Umamusume plushies called cuties.
choice_data_list: Do you want one of those plushies?
Do you want one of those plushies?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's not a question of desire. I simply cannot have
one.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If I were to get one... If I were to cradle it in my
arms...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And see those pleading eyes... I would need to
protect it!
choice_data_list: Let's get you some plushies to protect, then.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Get plushies for the purpose of protecting them?
That is one way to look at it...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Very well. I pray for your success!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
